goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'ely'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should 'leave after 08:00'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from ely
The train should leave on monday and should leave after 08:00
Make sure you get train ID and price
